<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of the league/commonmark package. * * (c) Colin O'Dell <colinodell@gmail.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace League\CommonMark\Extension\HeadingPermalink; use League\CommonMark\Node\Inline\AbstractInline; /** * Represents an anchor link within a heading */ final class HeadingPermalink extends AbstractInline { /** @psalm-readonly */ private string $slug; public function __construct(string $slug) { parent::__construct(); $this->slug = $slug; } public function getSlug(): string { return $this->slug; } }
